Greeto Chat Widget Demo

This page demonstrates the Greeto Chat Widget embedded on a customer's website.

Installation Methods:

Method 1: Auto-init with data attributes 
<script src="https://yourcdn.com/embed.js" 
        data-api-key="your-api-key"
        data-position="bottom-right"></script>
Method 2: Manual initialization 
<script src="https://yourcdn.com/embed.js"></script>
<script>
  const chat = new GreetoChatWidget({
    apiKey: 'your-api-key',
    position: 'bottom-right',
    primaryColor: '#2563EB'
  });
  chat.init();
</script>

The chat widget should appear in the bottom right corner. Try clicking it!
